title: NewFlatWorld
description: This mountain-opening stick adds a gameplay feature and can also level the ground directly.
body:
Kaishan Stick Mod (NewFlat World) is a very practical mod. The mod adds a new item, the Kaishan Stick, whose function is to flatten blocks within a certain range.  

Blocks in the flattened area drop normally. It is very useful when building houses, and it can also be used to dig directly underground for mining!
